```python
def s16Compress(out: List[int], outOffset: int, inp: List[int], inOffset: int, n: int, blockSize: int) -> Tuple[int, str]:
    numIdx = 0
    j = 0
    num = 0
    bits = 0
    try:
        for numIdx in range(S16_NUMSIZE):
            out[outOffset] = numIdx << S16_BITSSIZE
            num = S16_NUM[numIdx] if S16_NUM[numIdx] < n else n
            for j, bits in enumerate(S16_BITS[numIdx][:num]):
                out[outOffset] |= (inp[inOffset + j] << bits)
                bits += S16_BITS[numIdx][j]
                if j == num - 1:
                    return num, ""
    except Exception as e:
        return -1, f"s16Compress: numIdx:{numIdx}, j:{j}, num:{num}, bits:{bits}"
```
